patches.name: Disable FirebaseInitProvider
patches.description: Removes FirebaseInitProvider from AndroidManifest.xml to prevent crash when VM config data is missing.

patches.name: Disable pairip license check (manifest)
patches.description: Removes the pairip LicenseContentProvider from AndroidManifest to prevent auto-initialization of license checking.

patches.name: Enable cleartext traffic
patches.description: Sets usesCleartextTraffic to true in AndroidManifest and patches the network security config to allow cleartext HTTP traffic and user-installed CA certificates.

patches.name: Remove Play Store license check
patches.description: Removes the Play Store installation and license verification check (pairip).

patches.name: Remove certificate pinning
patches.description: Removes SSL/TLS certificate pinning for tv.media.jio.com.

patches.name: Remove emulator detection
patches.description: Removes emulator and unsupported device detection checks in PermissionActivity.

patches.name: Remove root detection
patches.description: Removes root detection checks. Bypasses Firebase CommonUtils.isRooted() and Xposed framework detection.
